name: Thorn Safer
description: Thorn Safer — CSAM detection API and hash matching for platforms protecting children online.

seo.title: Thorn Safer — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Thorn Safer: Thorn Safer — CSAM detection API and hash matching for platforms protecting children online.

when_to_use: Detecting CSAM and illegal content in uploaded media via API
Building child safety protections into content-sharing platforms
Running hash-matching and AI detection for illegal imagery
Complying with child protection regulations on user content platforms

pros: Hash matching against NCMEC and internal lists
Backed by a child-safety nonprofit mission
cons: Qualification and vetting required before access
Integration is serious work, not a quick API
review.verdict: If you host user images, you should have a CSAM plan; Safer is the serious-operator default.
review.best_for: Any platform hosting user-generated images or video at meaningful scale.
review.not_for: Teams looking for toxicity, NSFW-only, or general moderation APIs.
